calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-18-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Daniel CHeung, Esq. specially appearance for and with Appellant/Defendant Joyce Wong, and witness Frank Wong and Shi Yu Ye, and with court certified Cantonese Interpreter Amy Lo.
Respondent/Plaintiff Xueshan Li appears as Propria Persona and court certified Cantonese Interpreter Bannie Chow.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - Lease Agreement.
Exhibit (2) - Plumbing Invoice.
Witness Frank Wong and Shi Yu Ye testifies on behalf of them selves and responds to the questions from the Court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission.
Per stipulation by Mr. Cheung, exhibits are return to counsel in open court.

Dept. 606. Judge Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee; Clerk S. Ravinantapricha; Matter Not Reported.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2016 Set For Trial On Aug-18-16 At 09:40 A.M. In Dept 606

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-18-2016 Continued To Aug-18-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-23-2016 Judgment Entered
